backend/main.mo: Main actor implementing diagram storage with named diagrams per user, user profiles, access control, and blob storage mixins; provides CRUD operations for diagrams, icons, connections, drawings, lines, and text labels with authorization checks.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old single-diagram-per-user storage to new multi-diagram storage with named diagrams, wrapping existing DiagramState in NamedDiagram with default name.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting five implemented features: diagram naming on save, diagram selection interface for loading, clear button, PNG export replacing JPEG, and fixed free transform tool for icons and text labels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including authentication flow, report management pages (now deprecated), attack path visualization components with toolbar, canvas, icons, connectors, and various hooks for state management and backend queries.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with OKLCH color system defining light and dark theme variables for a security-focused dark blue/teal aesthetic with custom design tokens.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with root div and module script loading main.tsx for the Threat Hunting Report Portal application.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component with TanStack Router setup, Internet Identity authentication flow, profile setup modal, theme provider, and route definitions for report pages and attack path visualizer.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathCanvas: Interactive canvas component managing icon placement with drag/resize, connections, drawing modes (freehand/line/arrow), text labels with rotation/resize, eraser tool, free transform tool with visual handles, and click-to-remove functionality for connectors.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathConnec: Renders an SVG connector line with an arrowhead between two points on the attack path canvas. Calculates arrow angle, shortens the line to avoid icon overlap, and provides a wider invisible hit area for easier clicking.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathIcon.t: Displays draggable icons for attack path elements, mapping icon types to image assets or text-based representations. Handles drag-and-drop functionality and supports custom sizing and styling for various file types and network entities.
frontend/src/components/AttackPathToolba: Provides a sidebar toolbar with draggable attack path icons (email, attacker, server, etc.) and drawing tools (freehand, line, arrow, text, eraser). Includes action buttons for undo, save, load, export, clear, and text color selection.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main application layout component with header navigation, hero banner on homepage, and footer. Displays user profile, links to reports and attack path pages, and includes a new report creation button.
frontend/src/components/LoadDiagramDialo: Modal dialog for loading saved attack path diagrams from the backend. Displays a scrollable list of saved diagrams with metadata and converts backend DiagramState format to frontend state structure when loading.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Renders a logout button when user is authenticated using Internet Identity. Clears authentication state and query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/LoginPage.tsx: Full-page login screen with branding and secure authentication messaging. Triggers Internet Identity login flow and displays loading state during authentication.
frontend/src/components/MitreTechniqueSe: A React component providing a searchable popover interface for selecting MITRE ATT&CK techniques from a predefined list, with support for adding custom techniques via text input.
frontend/src/components/PdfGeneratorButt: A button component that triggers PDF generation for a detailed report using the pdfGenerator utility and displays loading state during generation.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that prompts new users to enter their name for profile setup, preventing dismissal until completed.
frontend/src/components/ReportForm.tsx: A comprehensive form component for creating threat hunt reports with fields for title, author, executive summary, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, findings, timeline, and remediation actions.
frontend/src/components/SaveDiagramDialo: A dialog component that prompts users to enter a name when saving an attack path diagram, with validation and loading states.
frontend/src/data/mitreAttackData.ts: Defines the MitreTechnique interface and exports a static array of MITRE ATT&CK techniques covering Initial Access, Execution, Persistence, and Privilege Escalation tactics.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that manages the backend actor instance, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAttackPathState.ts: A custom hook managing state for an attack path diagram editor, including placed icons, connections, drawings, text labels, undo history, and element selection/transformation.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllDiagrams.ts: React Query hook that fetches all diagrams from the backend actor, returning an array of NamedDiagram objects.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: React Query hook that fetches the current user's profile from the backend, with custom loading state that accounts for actor initialization.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetDiagramState.ts: React Query hook that fetches a specific diagram by ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for login/logout functionality using DFINITY's AuthClient with delegation identity management.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Contains React Query hooks for report CRUD operations (getAllReports, getReport, saveReport, deleteReport), but all backend methods are disabled/stubbed as the backend no longer supports report functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the current user's profile to the backend and invalidates the profile cache.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveDiagramState.t: React Query mutation hook that saves a diagram with name and state to the backend, then invalidates diagram-related queries.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including primary, secondary, destructive, and chart colors.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the App component.
frontend/src/pages/AttackPathPage.tsx: Main page for creating attack path diagrams with toolbar, canvas, and save/load dialogs; manages icons, connections, drawings, and text labels with undo functionality.
frontend/src/pages/CreateReportPage.tsx: Page component for creating new threat hunt reports using ReportForm, handles submission via useSaveReport mutation and navigates back on success.
frontend/src/pages/ReportDetailPage.tsx: Displays detailed view of a threat hunt report including executive summary, timeline, attack vector, evidence collection, affected systems, and remediation actions with PDF download capability.
frontend/src/pages/ReportListPage.tsx: React component that displays a table of all threat hunting reports with metadata (title, author, date, technique/IOC counts), supports viewing, deleting, and PDF generation for each report.
frontend/src/types/jspdf.d.ts: Empty TypeScript declaration file for jsPDF type definitions.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Utility function that generates a printable HTML document in a new window for threat hunting reports, including styled sections for metadata, threat actors, MITRE techniques, IOCs, and findings.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting, persisting, and managing URL parameters from both regular query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage integration for parameter persistence.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, extended theme with sidebar/chart colors, custom fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project state file documenting a threat hunting report portal with MITRE ATT&CK integration, listing implemented features including report creation, technique selection, PDF generation, and report listing functionality.
